positive: The airline's destination list includes Frankfurt or Frankfurt Airport
At least one listed destination is the city of Frankfurt in Germany
These destinations mention Frankfurt as a served city or airport
negative: Frankfurt is not among these destinations and is not mentioned
The destination text lists only cities other than Frankfurt
None of the named places is Frankfurt or Frankfurt Airport

cascade.stage1_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE mmqa.q6a_uncertain AS
    SELECT Airlines, Destinations
    FROM UNNEST(@airlines) AS Airlines WITH OFFSET pos
    JOIN UNNEST(@dests) AS Destinations WITH OFFSET pos2 ON pos = pos2
cascade.stage2_sql:
SELECT Airlines FROM mmqa.q6a_uncertain
    WHERE AI.IF("Given destinations '" || Destinations || "' of " || Airlines || ", the airline has flights to Frankfurt.",
      connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')

_ps_our_actual_bq.sql:
SELECT Airlines FROM mmqa.tampa_international_airport
    WHERE AI.IF("Given destinations '" || Destinations || "' of " || Airlines || ", the airline has flights to Frankfurt.",
      connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
